_doc: Stage 12 output contract for consensus to validation. Validated against runProductFinalizationDerivation() on 2026-03-17.

output_contract.identityGate: Cross-source identity gate object with validated, needsReview, certainty, contradictions, and reason codes.
output_contract.identityConfidence: Numeric certainty used by validation and publish thresholds.
output_contract.identityReport: Structured identity report artifact for the run.
output_contract.normalized: Final normalized field object before export.
output_contract.provenance: Final evidence-backed field provenance after critic and runtime gate passes.
output_contract.candidates: Consensus candidate rows preserved for review and diagnostics.
output_contract.fieldsBelowPassTarget: Current unresolved or under-confirmed fields after all refinement passes.
output_contract.criticalFieldsBelowPassTarget: Critical subset of unresolved or under-confirmed fields.
output_contract.llmValidatorDecisions: Optional validator decisions preserved by field.
output_contract.runtimeGateResult: Runtime field-rule validation and evidence enforcement result.
output_contract.confidence: Final confidence score derived from identity, provenance, and agreement.
output_contract.publishable: Final publishability boolean after gate + identity requirements.
output_contract.publishBlockers: Ordered list of blockers when publishable is false.
output_contract.trafficLight: Per-field green/yellow/red signal plus aggregate counts.
output_contract.needSet: Late-stage need-driven payload used for repair and GUI continuity.
output_contract.phase07PrimeSources: Prime source summary derived from late-stage provenance.
output_contract.phase08Extraction: Legacy-named extraction summary built from phase08 contexts and validator decisions.
output_contract.parserHealthAverage: Average parser health score for the run.

downstream_consumers: Stage 13 completion lifecycle uses summary, normalized, provenance, needSet, and phase08Extraction.
Run completed telemetry uses phase08Extraction summary rates, trafficLight counts, and contribution stats.
Final exporter uses publishable, publishBlockers, and normalized/provenance payloads.
